states.description: Device app drawer with alphabetical app grid
Retro Music main For You dashboard
visual_cues: quick-access tiles: History, Last added, Most played, Shuffle
bottom navigation: For you, Songs, Albums, Artists, Playlists

states.description: List of all songs in the library

visual_cues: 'You have no playlists' message when empty
filter chips: Songs, Artists, Albums, Album artist
list of recently played songs or 'You have no songs' empty state
list of songs with artist subtitle
stats line: X Album • Y Song • duration

states.description: Bottom/popup menu of actions for a single song
visual_cues: options: Play next, Add to playing queue, Add to playlist, Share, Tag editor, Details, Set as ringtone, Delete from device

states.description: Dialog to select an existing playlist or create new
Dialog to enter new playlist name
Persistent mini-player at bottom of screen

visual_cues: controls: repeat, prev, play/pause, next, shuffle
bottom utility icons: sleep timer (moon), lyrics, favorite (heart), queue, overflow

states.description: Lyrics display screen for current song
visual_cues: lyrics text or 'No lyrics found' message

states.description: Tag editor for song or album metadata
visual_cues: fields: Song, Album, Album artist, Artist, Composer, Genre, Year, Track, Disc Number, Lyrics
Save floating button or top-right action

states.description: Read-only details popup for a song
visual_cues: fields: File path, File name, Size, Last Modified, Format, Length, Bitrate, Sampling rate
categories: Look and feel, Now playing, Audio, Personalize, Images, Notification, Other, Backup & Restore, About
toggles: Fade audio, Always play, Crossfade, Gapless playback, Auto-play, Bluetooth playback
save FAB with floppy disk icon
options: Default, Ascending, Descending, Artist, Album, etc.

states.description: System permission dialog (modify audio file, modify system settings, nearby devices)

transitions.postcondition: app launched on For You tab

transitions.action: click(Add to playing queue) or click(Play next)
click(Set as ringtone) or click(Delete from device)

strategies.name: SET_SLEEP_TIMER
strategies.preconditions: App launched; a song is playing or shuffle started
steps: Start playback (Shuffle on For You, or play any song)
Click mini_player to open now_playing
Click moon (sleep timer) icon at bottom
Adjust slider to desired minutes (default 30)
Toggle 'Finish last song' checkbox if requested
Click Start
strategies.success_signal: Sleep timer dialog closes and returns to now_playing
strategies.fallback: If sleep timer not found in settings, ensure now_playing is open via mini-player

strategies.name: CREATE_PLAYLIST_AND_ADD_SONGS
steps: Navigate to Songs tab or use search to find first target song
Click three-dot menu next to song -> Add to playlist
Click 'New playlist' in dialog
Tap Playlist name field, type the playlist name
Click Create (first song is added automatically)
For each remaining song: locate it, click three-dot -> Add to playlist -> select the newly created playlist
strategies.fallback: If playlist tab is empty, can also create via Playlists tab overflow menu -> New playlist

strategies.name: ADD_TO_PLAYING_QUEUE
steps: Use search or browse to locate target song/artist
Click three-dot menu -> 'Add to playing queue' to append, or 'Play next' to insert next
strategies.success_signal: Toast 'Added N title to the playing queue'
strategies.fallback: If tapping song directly, it starts immediate playback instead of queuing

strategies.name: PLAY_SONG_FROM_LIST
steps: Navigate to relevant list (Last added, Songs, album, search results)
Scroll to find song
Click song row to start playback
strategies.success_signal: Mini player at bottom shows song title with pause icon
strategies.fallback: If 'Couldn't play this song' toast appears, the song may be unplayable; use three-dot menu for other actions

strategies.name: QUERY_SONG_DETAILS
strategies.preconditions: Target song located in any list
steps: Click three-dot menu next to song
Click 'Details' option
Read fields: Size, Format, Bitrate, Sampling rate, Length
Close with OK

strategies.name: EDIT_TAG_METADATA
steps: Open album detail and click pencil icon, OR three-dot menu on song -> Tag editor
Tap target field (e.g. Album, Lyrics)
Use Select all if existing text must be replaced
Type new value
Scroll to find Save button (may be hidden below keyboard)
Click Save
Click Allow on permission dialog to modify audio file
strategies.success_signal: Progress message 'Scanned X of Y files' or returns to previous screen
strategies.fallback: If save action triggers permission dialog and doesn't persist, repeat save after granting permission

strategies.name: ADD_LYRICS_MANUALLY
steps: Open now_playing from mini-player
Click lyrics icon at bottom
Click pencil FAB to open Edit Lyrics dialog
Type lyrics in Paste Lyrics Here field
Click SAVE
Click Allow on permission to modify audio file
If 'No lyrics found' still shown, repeat edit/save once after permission granted
strategies.success_signal: Lyrics view displays the entered text
strategies.fallback: Alternative path: song three-dot -> Tag editor -> Lyrics field

strategies.name: SEARCH_AND_FILTER
steps: Click search icon top-left
Type query in search field
Click filter chip (Songs, Artists, Albums, or Album artist)
Inspect or count results
strategies.success_signal: Results appear under selected category, or 'No results' shown
strategies.fallback: Clearing the field with X clears the entire query; re-type to switch filters

strategies.name: SET_AS_RINGTONE
steps: Click three-dot menu next to song
Click 'Set as ringtone'
Click OK on 'Allow modify audio settings' prompt
Toggle 'Allow modifying system settings' if redirected to system settings
Press Back to return to app
Repeat Set as ringtone after permission granted
strategies.success_signal: Returns to song list with no error toast
strategies.fallback: First attempt may be interrupted by permission flow; second attempt completes it

strategies.name: DELETE_SONG_FROM_DEVICE
steps: Click three-dot menu next to song
Click 'Delete from device'
Click Allow on permission dialog
strategies.success_signal: Song no longer present in songs list

strategies.name: CHANGE_APP_THEME
steps: Click gear icon top-right on For You
Click 'Look and feel'
Click 'App theme'
Select theme option (Clearly White / Kinda Dark / Follow system)
strategies.success_signal: App theme updates and dialog closes

strategies.name: EDIT_PROFILE_NAME
steps: Click profile avatar icon (not text) to open Profile screen
Click Name text field
Long press text and Select all (since type appends to existing text)
Type new name
Click save FAB (floppy icon)
strategies.success_signal: Returns to For You with 'Welcome, <new name>' visible
strategies.fallback: If typing appends to existing text, use long-press -> Select all -> type to overwrite

strategies.name: ENABLE_AUTO_RESUME_AUDIO
steps: Open Settings via gear icon
Tap 'Audio'
Toggle 'Auto-play' on for headphones
Toggle 'Bluetooth playback' on
Click Allow on nearby devices permission dialog

strategies.name: COUNT_LIST_ITEMS
strategies.preconditions: Navigate to specific list (Playlists, History, Artists results)
steps: Open relevant tab/section
If empty state visible, answer 0
Otherwise count visible entries (may need scrolling)

dead_ends.failed_action: search for sleep timer in audio settings
dead_ends.note: Sleep timer is NOT in Settings; it's accessible only via the moon icon on the now_playing screen

dead_ends.failed_action: search for sleep timer in Other settings
dead_ends.note: Sleep timer is not in any settings sub-page

dead_ends.failed_action: click overflow menu -> Details to edit lyrics
dead_ends.note: Details dialog is read-only; must use pencil FAB or song's Tag editor
First save triggers system permission dialog; lyrics not persisted until permission granted and save re-attempted

dead_ends.failed_action: click song result expecting context menu
dead_ends.note: Tapping song row starts playback; must tap three-dot icon for queue/playlist options

dead_ends.failed_action: click 'User Name' text to edit profile
dead_ends.note: Text is not interactive for editing; must click the circular profile avatar icon next to it
Type action appends to existing text rather than replacing; must long-press and Select all first
Adjacent apps (OpenTracks, Markor, Joplin, Photos) frequently opened by mistake; verify by app name label

dead_ends.failed_action: swipe up gesture too low or with long-press timing
dead_ends.note: Can trigger home screen wallpaper/widgets menu instead of app drawer

dead_ends.failed_action: click X clear icon expecting filter reset
dead_ends.note: X clears the entire query, not the filter; requires re-typing search term

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO
categories.precondition: App launched on some screen; target section reachable via main navigation, tabs, or quick tiles
abstract_steps: Identify primary navigation affordance (bottom bar, top tabs, drawer)
Tap the icon/label for target section
Verify destination by header text or highlighted nav indicator
failure_modes: Mistaking text labels for clickable affordances when only icons respond
Adjacent icons on cramped bars cause misclicks
Wrong app opened from launcher due to imprecise icon tap
verification_checklist: Active tab indicator highlights the chosen section
Expected content type visible (list, grid, etc.)

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: On a container view that can hold the new entry; system supports creation flow
abstract_steps: Open creation entry point (FAB, overflow menu option, or 'New X' button)
Provide required fields (name/text) in dialog
Confirm creation via Create/Save button
Optionally associate with existing item during creation
failure_modes: Creation entry hidden under overflow menu rather than FAB
Confirmation button hidden by on-screen keyboard
Empty name field prevents creation
verification_checklist: New entry appears in the container list

categories.name: ADD_TO_COLLECTION
abstract_steps: Open per-item action menu (three-dot or long-press)
Choose append/insert action (e.g., add to queue, play next, add to playlist)
If choosing playlist, pick existing or create new in dialog
failure_modes: Tapping item directly triggers playback instead of opening menu
Selecting the wrong adjacent item's menu due to imprecise tap
Choosing 'Add to queue' when 'Play next' is required (or vice versa)
verification_checklist: Collection size or contents reflect the addition
Currently playing track not interrupted unexpectedly

categories.name: DELETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target item exists; delete action available in context menu
abstract_steps: Open per-item action menu
Choose delete/remove option
Grant any required system permission
Confirm removal in any subsequent dialog
failure_modes: Missing system permission blocks deletion
Stale view continues to show item until refreshed
verification_checklist: Item no longer present in source list after refresh

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target entry has an edit affordance (pencil icon, edit option in menu)
abstract_steps: Open the editor for the entry
Focus target field
Clear existing content if necessary (long-press + Select all)
Enter new value
Dismiss keyboard if it hides save action
Save changes
Grant any file/system permission required
failure_modes: Typing appends to existing text instead of replacing
Save button hidden behind keyboard or below scroll
Permission interrupts save and requires retry
Read-only details dialog mistaken for editor
verification_checklist: Edited field shows new value after returning
Persistent across navigation away and back

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: Information visible on a specific detail screen or dialog
abstract_steps: Navigate to entity (list -> item, or search)
Open details view if metadata required
Read requested fields
Report exact value as required
failure_modes: Tapping item plays it instead of showing info; must use context menu
Information requires scrolling or expanding
Empty-state messages mistaken for data

categories.name: SEARCH_AND_FILTER
categories.precondition: Search affordance available; filter chips/tabs present
abstract_steps: Open search entry
Type query string
Apply category filter via chip/tab
Inspect or count results, including empty-state
failure_modes: Clearing query also resets context unexpectedly
Filter chip not visibly active; misread as off
Pluralization or case-sensitivity not matching expected entries
verification_checklist: Query string visible in search field
Result count matches expectation, or 'No results' explicitly shown

categories.name: TOGGLE_SETTING
abstract_steps: Open settings menu
Navigate to the relevant sub-page
Toggle the switch or select the desired option
Grant any system permission triggered
failure_modes: Assuming feature lives in settings when it lives elsewhere (e.g., contextual menu)
Permission denial leaves the toggle in inconsistent state

categories.name: PLAY_MEDIA
categories.precondition: Media library accessible; target item discoverable
abstract_steps: Locate the item via browse or search
Tap the item to begin playback, or tap a 'Play all' action
Verify mini-player or full-screen player shows the title with playing indicator
failure_modes: Tapping unplayable item shows error toast
Wrong artist/album variant selected due to multiple matches

categories.name: CONFIGURE_PLAYBACK_OPTIONS
abstract_steps: Expand the full-screen player from the mini-player
Toggle the desired option (repeat mode, shuffle, favorite)
Open auxiliary dialogs (sleep timer) and confirm
failure_modes: Repeat icon requires multiple taps to reach 'Repeat One' mode
Confusing 'Add to queue' (append) with 'Play next' (insert)
verification_checklist: Icon state reflects desired mode (filled heart, '1' on repeat, highlighted shuffle)

categories.name: RECOVER_FROM_WRONG_APP
categories.precondition: Wrong app opened from launcher or accidental navigation
abstract_steps: Press Home to return to launcher
Re-open app drawer
Scroll precisely to target alphabetical position
Verify app name label before tapping icon
failure_modes: Repeated mis-taps if icons are clustered or look similar
Long-press gesture instead of swipe opening wallpaper menu
verification_checklist: Expected home screen of the target app appears
